underlying_goal: Fix application crash caused by Live2D module loading, and improve the frontend UI by referencing the airi project's frontend design
friction_detail: After fixing the Live2D lazy loading crash, the user reported it still had problems and redirected Claude to reference airi's frontend instead, but Claude spent too long planning before the user interrupted.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix an app crash and improve the UI by referencing airi's frontend; the crash fix succeeded but the UI improvement was still in planning when the session was interrupted.
